disease_info: Yellow Leaf Rust — Wheat · Field A · Diagnosed Today
isolation_desc: Separate infected plants from healthy ones. Remove and burn infected leaves immediately.
fungicide_desc: Apply Propiconazole 25% EC at 1 ml/litre water.
recovery_desc: Inspect plants daily and check for new symptoms.
nitrogen_warning: Do not apply nitrogen while disease is active. Wait until recovery begins.
method_knapsack_desc: Spray early morning with full leaf coverage.
method_drip_desc: Use for water-soluble fertilizers via irrigation.
trichoderma_benefit: Biocontrol agent that fights fungal pathogens.
renew_plan: Renew Pro Plan to Keep Access
